item.title: 如何使用 EAS/Expo 和 React Native 设置环境变量 | How to set environment variables with EAS/Expo and React Native
item.description:
亚历山大·C。

发表于 1 月 27 日

大多数时候，您的项目需要处理环境变量，例如 API Url 或 API 密钥。 由于将您的密钥和敏感数据存储在 Github/Gitlab 上或硬编码在您的项目中是不安全的，因此对于 React Native 项目而言，最好的解决方案是受益于 EAS 和 Expo 配置。

先决条件

您的 React Native 项目应该配置为使用 EAS，如果不是这样，请遵循此文档。

那么如果你的项目已经由 Expo 管理，你应该有expo-constants包，如果没有，你可以按照这些说明安装它。

最后你必须在你的项目中安装dotenv包

npx expo install dotenv

配置环境变量

首先重要的是，在项目的根目录下，您必须将app.json文件转换为app.config.js文件

明文环境变量

在您的eas.json文件中，您可以添加您愿意提交给您的源代码的纯文本/硬编码环境变量。 例如 API 网址。

警告
不要把秘密放在这里！

然后在你的app.config.js中你必须像这样引用这些变量

秘密

要在您的环境变量中管理机密，您必须使用 EAS CLI 创建一个新机密

eas secret:create --scope project --name SECRET_NAME --value secretvalue --type string

要查看项目的任何现有机密，请运行

eas secret:list


您还可以从.env文件导入您的秘密

eas secret:push --scope project --env-file .env

然后要访问您的秘密，您需要配置您的app.config.js文件

访问项目中的环境变量

要在项目中使用环境变量，使用expo-constants包很容易。

例如在屏幕中

有关更多详细信息和配置，您可以随时查看官方 Expo 和 EAS 文档

永恒的开发帖子...

如何写一个 kickass README

可以说，对于任何开源项目来说，最重要的文档就是 README。 一个好的 README 不仅告诉人们这个项目是做什么的，它是为谁服务的，而且还告诉人们他们如何使用和贡献它。

如果你写的 README 没有充分解释你的项目做什么或人们如何使用它，那么它几乎违背了开源的目的，因为其他开发人员不太可能参与或贡献它。

巴克利桑托 - 22 年 7 月 14 日

一旦暂停，alexcoding42 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，alexcoding42 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，alexcoding42 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 alexcoding42 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 alexcoding42 的方法：

降低 alexcoding42 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 alexcoding42 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Alexandre C.

Posted on Jan 27

Most of the time your project will need to handle environment variables such as API Url or API key. As it is unsafe to store your keys and sensitive data on Github/Gitlab or hardcoded in your project, the best solution when it comes to React Native project is to benefit from EAS and Expo configuration.

Prerequisites

Your React Native project should be configured to use EAS, follow this documentation if it's not the case.

Then if your project is already managed by Expo you should have the expo-constants package, if not you can install it following these instructions.

Last you have to install dotenv package in your project

npx expo install dotenv

Configure your environment variables

First important thing, at the root of your project you must convert the app.json file to app.config.js file

Plaintext environment variables

In your eas.json file you can add plaintext/harcoded environment variables that you are comfortable with committing to your source code. For example API Url.

Warning
Don't put secrets here!

eas.json

Then in your app.config.js you must reference these variables like this

app.config.js

Secrets

To manage secrets in your environment variables you have to create a new secret with EAS CLI

eas secret:create --scope project --name SECRET_NAME --value secretvalue --type string

To view any existing secrets for your project, run

eas secret:list


You can also importing your secrets from a .env file

eas secret:push --scope project --env-file .env

Then to access your secrets you need to configure your app.config.js file

Access your environment variables in your project

To use environment variables in your project it is easy using expo-constants package.

For example in a screen

For more details and configuration you can always to the official Expo and EAS documentation

Timeless DEV post...

How to write a kickass README

Arguably the single most important piece of documentation for any open source project is the README. A good README not only informs people what the project does and who it is for but also how they use and contribute to it.

If you write a README without sufficient explanation of what your project does or how people can use it then it pretty much defeats the purpose of being open source as other developers are less likely to engage with or contribute towards it.

Mago Acadêmico - Aug 22 '22

Juri Strumpflohner - Aug 18 '22

Barkley Santo - Jul 14 '22

Once suspended, alexcoding42 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, alexcoding42 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by alexcoding42 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If alexcoding42 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag alexcoding42:

Make all posts by alexcoding42 less visible

alexcoding42 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging alexcoding42 will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: alexcoding42

item.title: 如何使用 jsPDF 将 HTML 转换为 PDF | How To Convert HTML To PDF Using jsPDF
item.description:
在本文中，我们将看到如何使用 jsPDF 将 HTML 转换为 pdf。 在这里，我们将学习如何使用 javascript 将 HTML 转换为 PDF。

我们正在使用 jsPDF 在 javascript 中生成 PDF。 它可以从客户端生成 PDF。 它还提供了多种生成 PDF 文件的选项。 您可以生成带有图像和多页的 PDF 文件，还支持不同的语言，如日语、阿拉伯语、俄语等。

了解更多：jsPDF Javascript PDF 生成。

因此，让我们看看 jsPDF HTML 到 pdf 转换，jsPDF HTML 到 pdf 多页，使用 javascript 将 HTML 转换为 pdf，使用 jsPDF 在 javascript 中将 HTML 转换为 pdf。

使用 NPM 安装

  • 例子：

    在此步骤中，我们将创建一个 HTML 文件。 因此，将以下代码添加到文件中。

     <html> <h1>How To Convert HTML To PDF Using jsPDF- Techsolutionstuff</h1> <form class="form"> <table> <tbody> <tr> <th>Company Name</th> <th>Employee Name</th> <th>Country</th> </tr> <tr> <td>Dell</td> <td>Maria</td> <td>Germany</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Asus</td> <td>Francisco</td> <td>Mexico</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Apple</td> <td>Roland</td> <td>Austria</td> </tr> <tr> <td>HP</td> <td>Helen</td> <td>UK</td> </tr> <tr> <td>Lenovo</td> <td>Yoshi</td> <td>Canada</td> </tr> </tbody> </table><br> <input type="button" id="generate_pdf" value="Generate PDF"> </form> </html>

    现在，添加此 HTML 页面的样式。

     <style> table { font-family: arial, sans-serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; } td { border: 1px solid #dddddd; text-align: left; padding: 8px; } th{ border: 1px solid #dddddd; text-align: left; padding: 8px; background-color: #111; color:white; } tr:nth-child(odd) { background-color: #dddddd; } </style>

    将以下脚本添加到 HTML 页面以将其转换为 pdf。

     <script src="https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.5.1/jquery.min.js"></script> <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/1.3.5/jspdf.min.js"></script> <script> $(document).ready(function () { var form = $('.form'), cache_width = form.width(), a4 = [595.28, 841.89]; // for a4 size paper width and height $('#generate_pdf').on('click', function () { $('body').scrollTop(0); generatePDF(); }); function generatePDF() { getCanvas().then(function (canvas) { var img = canvas.toDataURL("image/png"), doc = new jsPDF({ unit: 'px', format: 'a4' }); doc.addImage(img, 'JPEG', 20, 20); doc.save('tech-html-to-pdf.pdf'); form.width(cache_width); }); } function getCanvas() { form.width((a4[0] * 1.33333) - 80).css('max-width', 'none'); return html2canvas(form, { imageTimeout: 2000, removeContainer: true }); } }); </script>

    你可能还喜欢：

    • 一旦暂停，techsolutionstuff 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

    解除暂停后，techsolutionstuff 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，techsolutionstuff 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 techsolutionstuff 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    笔记：

    感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 techsolutionstuff：

    降低 techsolutionstuff 的所有帖子的可见度

    报告其他不当行为

    不屈不挠的 techsolutionstuff 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    In this article, we will see how to convert HTML to pdf using jsPDF. Here, we will learn how to convert HTML to PDF using javascript.

    We are using jsPDF to generate PDF in javascript. It can generate PDFs from the client side. The jsPDF is very easy to use in javascript.

    It also provides multiple options for generating PDF files. You can generate PDF files with images, and multiple pages, and also support different languages like Japanese, Arabic, Russian, etc.

    Learn More: jsPDF Javascript PDF Generate.

    So, let's see jsPDF HTML to pdf convert, jsPDF HTML to pdf multiple pages, convert HTML to pdf using javascript, HTML to pdf in javascript using jsPDF.

    jsPDF provides two different methods to use.

    1. Install using NPM
    2. jsPDF CDN File

    Example:

    In this step, we will create an HTML file. So, add the following code to the file.

    <html>
    <h1>How To Convert HTML To PDF Using jsPDF- Techsolutionstuff</h1>
    <form class="form">        
        <table>  
            <tbody>  
                <tr>  
                    <th>Company Name</th>  
                    <th>Employee Name</th>  
                    <th>Country</th>  
                </tr>  
                <tr>  
                    <td>Dell</td>  
                    <td>Maria</td>  
                    <td>Germany</td>  
                </tr>  
                <tr>  
                    <td>Asus</td>  
                    <td>Francisco</td>  
                    <td>Mexico</td>  
                </tr>  
                <tr>  
                    <td>Apple</td>  
                    <td>Roland</td>  
                    <td>Austria</td>  
                </tr>  
                <tr>  
                    <td>HP</td>  
                    <td>Helen</td>  
                    <td>UK</td>  
                </tr>  
                <tr>  
                    <td>Lenovo</td>  
                    <td>Yoshi</td>  
                    <td>Canada</td>  
                </tr>
            </tbody>  
        </table><br>  
        <input type="button" id="generate_pdf" value="Generate PDF">  
    </form>  
</html>

    Now, add the style of this HTML page.

    <style>
table {  
    font-family: arial, sans-serif;  
    border-collapse: collapse;  
    width: 100%;  
}  

td {  
    border: 1px solid #dddddd;  
    text-align: left;  
    padding: 8px;  
} 
th{
    border: 1px solid #dddddd;  
    text-align: left;  
    padding: 8px;  
    background-color: #111;  
    color:white;
}

tr:nth-child(odd) {  
    background-color: #dddddd;  
}
</style>

    Add the following script to the HTML page for converting it to pdf.

    <script src="https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.5.1/jquery.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jspdf/1.3.5/jspdf.min.js"></script>  
<script>
$(document).ready(function () {  
    var form = $('.form'),  
    cache_width = form.width(),  
    a4 = [595.28, 841.89]; // for a4 size paper width and height  

    $('#generate_pdf').on('click', function () {  
        $('body').scrollTop(0);  
        generatePDF();  
    });  

    function generatePDF() {  
        getCanvas().then(function (canvas) {  
            var img = canvas.toDataURL("image/png"),  
             doc = new jsPDF({  
                 unit: 'px',  
                 format: 'a4'  
             });  
            doc.addImage(img, 'JPEG', 20, 20);  
            doc.save('tech-html-to-pdf.pdf');  
            form.width(cache_width);  
        });  
    }  

    function getCanvas() {  
        form.width((a4[0] * 1.33333) - 80).css('max-width', 'none');  
        return html2canvas(form, {  
            imageTimeout: 2000,  
            removeContainer: true  
        });  
    }
});
</script>

    You might also like:

    Michael J. Larocca - Jan 23

    Once suspended, techsolutionstuff will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, techsolutionstuff will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by techsolutionstuff will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If techsolutionstuff is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Note:

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag techsolutionstuff:

    Make all posts by techsolutionstuff less visible

    techsolutionstuff consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging techsolutionstuff will restore default visibility to their posts.
